exclusions: Legacy archive subdomain (pre-2015 content, scheduled for retirement)

methodology.description: Evaluation follows STAR (2026-07-03 snapshot). Automated evidence imported from vital-core; remaining criteria evaluated manually or via organizational documentation.
methodology.automated_coverage_note: vital-core covers page weight, image inventory, and a subset of accessibility checks.
methodology.manual_coverage_note: UX and content criteria reviewed manually against a five-page sample.
methodology.organizational_evidence_note: Procurement and governance criteria evaluated from the agency's published IT sustainability policy.

findings.wsg_title: Identify, assess, disclose, review, and mitigate sustainability impacts
findings.evaluation_method: Review of published organizational policy documents

evidence.summary: Agency IT sustainability policy documents an annual impact review process.

findings.impact: Organization has a documented review process but has not disclosed findings publicly.
findings.remediation_recommendation: Publish impact review findings alongside the policy document.

evidence.summary: Page weight and accessibility scan found no blocking issues on sampled pages.

findings.notes: Automated evidence only; not independently confirmed by manual review.

findings.evaluation_method: Manual code review of a five-page sample

evidence.summary: Third-party analytics script loaded on every page, unminified, no caching headers.

manual.method: Browser devtools network inspection on 5 sampled pages

findings.impact: Adds roughly 90KB uncompressed to every page load, no cache reuse across visits.
findings.remediation_recommendation: Enable caching headers on the analytics script or self-host a minified build.

findings.wsg_title: Sample business/product guideline not evaluated this cycle
findings.evaluation_method: Out of scope for this evaluation cycle
findings.notes: Deferred to next quarter's procurement review.

top_risks: Uncached third-party analytics script adds avoidable page weight across the entire site.
top_opportunities: Publishing the existing sustainability impact review would close a disclosure gap at low cost.
unresolved_questions: Whether the legacy archive subdomain excluded from scope should be retired or brought into scope next cycle.
required_follow_up: Procurement/governance criteria review, deferred to next quarter.
narrative.remediation_roadmap: Short term: fix analytics caching. Medium term: publish impact review findings. Long term: evaluate legacy archive subdomain retirement.
